claim_verdicts.reason: The quoted phrase and reference direction to Vaswani et al. (2017) appear verbatim in ev_3540835408466c6e; the claim is fully supported.
claim_verdicts.verified_text: BERT explicitly cites Vaswani et al. (2017) ("Attention Is All You Need") as the source of its core Transformer architecture, stating its model is "a multi-layer bidirectional Transformer encoder based on the original implementation described in Vaswani et al. (2017)" and referring readers to that work for background on the model architecture.

field_values.inherited_components: multi-layer Transformer encoder stack, multi-head self-attention mechanism, Transformer block notation (L, H, A)

claim_verdicts.reason: Self-attention layers, Transformer block notation (L, H, A), and self-attention heads are explicitly described; "almost identical to the original" is the passage's exact wording rather than "reusing the same," so the claim is narrowed accordingly.
claim_verdicts.verified_text: BERT's model architecture is a multi-layer bidirectional Transformer encoder "almost identical to the original" implementation of Vaswani et al. (2017), using the same self-attention layers, Transformer blocks, and notation L (number of layers/Transformer blocks), H (hidden size), and A (number of self-attention heads).

field_values.bert_adaptations: multi-layer bidirectional Transformer encoder, jointly conditioning on both left and right context in all layers, Masked Language Model (MLM) and Next Sentence Prediction (NSP) pre-training objectives

claim_verdicts.reason: Bidirectional conditioning and MLM/NSP pre-training are directly supported. The "no decoder" exclusion cannot be inferred from encoder-only descriptions, and the "instead of the original sequence-to-sequence translation objective" is unsupported — the passages only contrast with left-to-right language model pre-training.
claim_verdicts.verified_text: BERT adapts the Transformer architecture by using only the encoder stack as a "multi-layer bidirectional Transformer encoder," jointly conditioning on both left and right context in all layers, and pre-training with the Masked Language Model (MLM) objective together with a Next Sentence Prediction (NSP) task.

missing_required_evidence.description: What architecture does Attention Is All You Need introduce: encoder-decoder with multi-head self-attention, scaled dot-product attention, positional encoding, and the specific notation/components that BERT later reuses?
